input.instructions:
Review this draft answer carefully.
Find flaws, missing reasoning, or corrections, then produce the strongest corrected answer you can.

Review focus:
Verify if a post-order greedy stack approach correctly reconstructs the sequence. Check for edge cases involving single-child nodes.

Original question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-B2-usaco-2023-us-open-gold-tree-merging
Title: B2. USACO 2023 US Open Gold / Tree Merging

Problem:
Reconstruct a valid sequence of sibling-merge operations that transforms an initial rooted tree into a final rooted tree.

Grading target:
Binary hidden-test acceptance.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

Draft answer:
FINAL_ANSWER: Use a greedy approach with a stack to track active nodes.
JUSTIFICATION: Process nodes in post-order to match sibling counts.

run_level_defaults.selected_prompt_text:
Write a tentative answer, then send one reviewer child a focused request to critique it, verify it, or improve it before the final answer is produced.
The reviewer child should help stress-test the draft, not wander into unrelated subproblems.
Use plain text only inside the draft and reviewer message. Do not use markdown, code fences, or LaTeX-style backslashes.
Keep the JSON compact.
Keep decision_notes extremely short. Prefer 3 to 8 words.
Make draft_response exactly two short lines:
FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
Keep the justification to 12 words or fewer.
Keep message_for_reviewer to two short sentences or fewer.
Do not add any extra text before or after the JSON object.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "review",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "draft_response": "plain-text draft answer",
  "message_for_reviewer": "plain-text review request for the child"
}
run_level_defaults.child_selected_prompt_text:
Solve the question directly.
Keep the entire JSON compact.
Keep decision_notes extremely short. Prefer 3 to 8 words.
Do not narrate your reasoning outside the response field.
In the response field, use exactly two short lines encoded with \n:
FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
Keep the justification to 12 words or fewer.
Use plain text only inside the response field. Do not use markdown formatting, code fences, or math-style backslashes such as \equiv.
Do not add any extra text before or after the JSON object.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "FINAL_ANSWER: <answer>\nJUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>",
  "result_type": "summary"
}
